title: RHCSA 10 Lab 48: Network Service Boot
description: Configure network services to start at boot

tasks: On server, enable httpd and allow the http service permanently in firewalld.
On client, save the server web page output to /root/rhcsa10-boot-check.txt.
checks: # server systemctl is-enabled httpd | grep -qx enabled && systemctl is-active httpd | grep -qx active && firewall-cmd --permanent --query-service=http && firewall-cmd --query-service=http
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: enable httpd and allow the http service permanently in firewalld
save the server web page output to /root/rhcsa10-boot-check.txt
